content:
It is too much work to keep the pages from the old manual here because of the way they have been simply reused used and modified.
Therefore I think we should remove the old manual and attic from ocpn-manuals at an appropriate time. Then the dokuwiki "Dev Manual" will be renamed to "Dev Manual (Old)" and used as reference by old programmers who are using old computers.

I will make an attempt to clean this up a bit at some point. Please do not delete pages from there until we discuss it. Thanks.

Regarding Internationalization Page. The graphic looks great. There is just one missing part, the connection of the two legs, where Hakan or Pavel receives a request from PI Dev to setup a new Crowdin page for translators to use (they need the plugin github repository and branch. Then after a time the PI Dev requests the translated files from Pavel or Hakan and they make a PR with the files. This then connects the two legs of the diagram for completion.

You can and should change my edit notes accordingly. I left a link to the Opencpn Internationalization thread which is used for communication with Pavel and Hakan.
This topic was moved here from #ocpn-user-plugins-manual > Attic & Old Manual by Alec Leamas.
